fault_hypothesis: The slice operation on line 72 is `results[start:end + 1]` instead of the correct `results[start:end]`. This off-by-one error causes the function to return one more item than specified by `page_size` when the page is not the last one.

constraints.intent: The number of items in the returned page slice must not exceed the page size.
The final returned page must not contain more items than the page size.

spec.expr: end__1 >= len(results) or results[end__1] not in results[start__1:end__1 + 1]

constraints.intent: The element at the exclusive end index `end` should not be included in the returned slice.
The calculated index range between start and end should exactly match the page size.
